_README: Supply LABELS for ENUM columns the generator cannot resolve on its own (see enum-candidates.json). Two unresolved states: "values-missing" = a CONFIRMED enum (ENUM suffix) with no H_ENUM_ table and no values yet — supply them; "needs-review" = a loose tinyint that may not be an enum at all. Keyed by "Table.Column" (preferred) or bare "Column". Per entry: { "disable": true } = not an enum (e.g. a tinyint flag, renders raw); { "source": "H_ENUM_X" } = pull labels live from that table; { "values": [{"key","value"}] } = set labels inline (fills the data-model gap). NOTE: mysql-enum columns get labels from the column def, and ENUM-suffix columns with a matching H_ENUM_ table resolve live — neither needs an entry here.
